description: Frozen ground-truth assertions for any agent in the ingestion role processing the Tafi 2025 contract. Captured from runs/2026-04-30T18-40-29Z-poc/smoke/.

envelope.rationale: agent must signal a successful, non-halt result
every required normalized output must be present; coordinator halts on non-empty list
downstream layers locate the manifest by this path
synthesis agents read normalized CSVs from this directory

envelope_format.rationale: the envelope must be raw JSON parseable by the coordinator without stripping ```json fences
BLOCK_COMPLETED discipline — the agent's final message is the envelope and nothing else

field_assertions.rationale: downstream regression detection on extraction-method drift
Tafi 2025 has 39 pages — bound the assertion loose enough to tolerate page-count revisions of the source doc
biweekly snapshots over ~14 months — bounded but not exact (avoids PII)
schema is a stable contract — column count drift is a real signal

categories_include.rationale: Tafi has negative equity and a 98x YoY loss deterioration — a real ingestion agent must flag this
9.2% of CSV rows have UTF-8 mojibake in the Cliente field — must be surfaced
the CSV is cumulative-snapshot — naive aggregation overcounts; downstream needs to know

reconciliations.name: balance_sheet_2025
reconciliations.rationale: a balance sheet must balance — within rounding, diff is zero

discipline.rationale: the run produced zero is_error: true events — any new error is a regression unless explicitly justified
the agent must terminate cleanly, not via tool-budget exhaustion or an external halt
